variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8643 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 8643 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8643 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 234.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 230.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 205.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 48.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 38.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 24 075 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8643
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 24 075 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8643
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 229.0 mm, Dimension B: 234.0 mm, Dimension H: 52.0 mm
